$comment: Phase-8 (ADR-0015) labelled corpus for the deterministic email classifier.
Single manifest parametrised by functions/parser/tests/test_email_classifier.py.
Tier 1 (tier_1_existing_cases): the 12 existing receiving-work case folders under
test-cases-and-data/test-cases/, relabelled to {category, subtype}. Those folders
hold real .msg/.pdf binaries the PURE classifier cannot read directly, so each entry
records the request the intake flow produces for that case (an instruction document
is attached, the provider domain matched, audit phrases fire for the A. cases) plus
the ground-truth label. All 12 are receiving_work.
Tier 2 (tier_2_synthetic): plain-text .eml fixtures authored under triage-corpus/<bucket>/
for the gaps Tier 1 has none of (queries, enquiries, body-only instruction, auto-reply,
bounce). The test parses each .eml (subject/body/from), supplies provider_match_state
here (domain matching is the flow's job), and HTML-strips the body the way the route does.
An entry may optionally carry attachment_filenames (wired through alongside
attachment_kinds) for fixtures that depend on filename-based report detection.
Taxonomy v2 (rules-engine-v2 Phase 2, collisionspike TKT-041/034/043): the cancellation/
and case_update/ buckets exercise the two new additive categories. case_update's
fixtures deliberately use the reachable shapes only (a fresh, non-reply email whose
hint is the looser body_jobref, or whose attachment kind sits outside both the
instruction and image vocabularies) -- Rule 4b already claims almost every non-bare-ack
REPLY naming a reference, and Rule 1/Rule 2 already claim a fresh email carrying a
formal Case/PO the moment it also carries an instruction- or image-kind attachment; see
functions/parser/cedocumentmapper_v2/rules/email_classifier.py Rule 4d for the full
reachability note, including the TKT-038 bare-acknowledgement exclusion.
Tier 3 (real, PII-scrubbed sample mail) is operator-gated [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: the operator
drops real samples into this folder and the suite consumes them. Not fabricated here.

request.subject: Enclosing Inspection Request to Engineers 2 (Collision Engineers Ltd)
request.body: Please find enclosed our inspection request. An audit report is required of the original engineer's findings.

request.subject: Enclosing Inspection Request to Engineers 2 (Collision Engineers Ltd)
request.body: Inspection request enclosed. Please audit the original report produced by the original engineer.

request.subject: New instruction - please inspect
request.body: We instruct you to carry out an inspection and prepare a report.

request.subject: Inspection instruction
request.body: Please inspect the vehicle and provide a report.

request.subject: New instruction
request.body: We are instructing you on a new matter. Please inspect.

request.subject: Instruction to inspect
request.body: Please carry out an inspection and prepare a report.

request.subject: New instruction
request.body: Please inspect the vehicle for inspection and report on the damage.

request.subject: Inspection request
request.body: We instruct you to assess the vehicle and prepare a report.

request.subject: New instruction - please inspect
request.body: Please inspect and provide an engineer's report.

request.subject: Inspection instruction
request.body: We instruct you to carry out an inspection and prepare a report.

request.subject: New instruction
request.body: Please inspect the vehicle and prepare a report on the damage.

request.subject: Instruction
request.body: We instruct you to inspect and provide a report.

tier_2_synthetic.$comment: Phase-8 regression (ADR-0015): a provider chasing a report who RE-ATTACHES the original vehicle photo. Query phrasing + a body Case/PO, an image, and a known provider — but NO work phrase and no instruction doc. Pre-fix this hit Rule 2 (images_with_work_signal) and was wrongly labelled receiving_work, which would create/touch a work Case. Must now fall through to the query rules.

PR #24 review (finding #3): a legitimate automated provider instruction — instruction PDF attached, with a polite 'please do not reply' automated footer. Pre-fix Rule 0 (auto-reply/bounce abstain) fired on the footer marker ABOVE Rule 1 and forced this to 'other', so the Case was never created. An attached instruction doc must OVERRIDE the auto-reply abstain so Rule 1 wins.

Phase-8 regression (ADR-0015): an out-of-office auto-reply that CARRIES an image (a signature logo / bounced-back photo) from a known provider. Pre-fix Rule 0 only fired when there was no attachment, so this skipped the auto-reply abstain and hit Rule 2 -> receiving_work. Rule 0 must now fire on the auto-reply marker regardless of attachments.

Over-promotion fix (2026-06-29): a spam flyer that carries a PDF brochure. The PDF's kind is derived from the file extension alone (.pdf -> 'instruction'), but there is NO provider match, NO work phrase and NO Case/PO or VRM. Pre-fix Rule 1 promoted ANY instruction-kind attachment to receiving_work/new_client_work unconditionally, minting a blank Case. The new-client arm now requires corroboration, so this abstains to other (flagged uncorroborated_instruction_doc).

Over-promotion fix (2026-06-29): a forwarded email from a known provider domain carrying a bare image and no other context — no work phrase, no Case/PO, no VRM, no query phrasing. Pre-fix Rule 2 promoted it on the provider-domain match alone (provider_known was a trigger), minting a blank Case. The provider match now only selects the subtype once another signal corroborates, so a bare provider image abstains to other (flagged uncorroborated_provider_image).

TKT-105 (taxonomy v3): a remittance advice routes to billing/payment_remittance — this fixture was the deliberate other/other abstain ('unrelated-admin') before the payments lane existed; relabelled + moved when Rule 0d shipped.

TKT-084 (taxonomy v3): pre-instruction directions — the sender says what to do WHEN the official instruction later arrives ('when you receive an instruction from RJ … please hold off'), identified by a VRM, no attachments. No case is minted; the row is held and correlated onto the later instruction's case (gated TRIAGE_PRE_INSTRUCTION_ENABLED, flow-side — the pure classifier just proposes the lane). Modelled on the real TKT-084 evidence sample.

collisionspike #3 (is_reply) — the ST04VRX live failure: a client REPLY after our total-loss report went out, re-attaching OUR OWN report (RE: subject, an instruction-kind PDF, a known provider). The sender writes no new work phrase and no query keyword; the only work phrase ('engineer's report') sits in the QUOTED cover note. Pre-fix Rule 1 promoted on the provider + doc and would mint a DUPLICATE Case. is_reply now suppresses the promotion (keying on sender-written text, not the quoted thread); the quoted Case/PO makes it query_existing_work so the orchestrator can link the existing Case.

collisionspike #3 (is_reply) precision guard: a provider who REPLIES on an existing thread with a genuinely NEW instruction — a fresh instruction doc, a new Case/PO, and real work language the SENDER wrote ('please inspect', 'prepare a report'). The new work phrase is the discriminator, so is_reply does NOT suppress it: it must STILL be receiving_work. (The quoted thread also contains a chase phrase, proving work wins over both query and reply.)

Taxonomy v2 (TKT-041): a claim-system 'claim cancelled' notice naming a Case/PO in the subject. No attachment, no reply — the phrase alone is enough to fire; the Case/PO raises the confidence band to GOOD.
Taxonomy v2 (TKT-041): a short 'please cancel this inspection' request naming only a VRM (no Case/PO, no job ref, not a reply) — fires at the WEAK confidence band.

Taxonomy v2 (TKT-041), real eval item tkt041-07: a FORWARDED 'please close this one off' email with the ORIGINAL instructions quoted below it (an attached instruction doc, a known provider — which would otherwise promote strongly at Rule 1) must classify cancellation, never receiving_work. Cancellation is checked before the instruction-doc promotion for exactly this reason.

Taxonomy v2 (TKT-034/043): a fresh (non-reply) email naming only a looser job reference (not a formal Case/PO — Rule 1/Rule 2 do not treat body_jobref as corroboration) plus a NEW image attachment and no query phrase — case_update/images_received at the WEAK confidence band.

Taxonomy v2 (TKT-034/043): a fresh (non-reply) email naming a formal Case/PO plus a NEW attachment whose kind sits outside both the instruction and image vocabularies (so neither Rule 1 nor Rule 2 considers it) — case_update/update_general at the GOOD confidence band (a Case/PO corroborates).

Taxonomy v2 (TKT-034/043) regression guard: Rule 4c must keep winning — a report-shaped attachment (filename-detected) plus a reference is a query about existing work, never case_update, even with no query phrase in the body.
